view.title: Tiro Tūmau {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te tono anō i te īmēra whakamihi?
view.emailSentMessage: Kua tukuna anō te īmēra whakamihi. Tirohia tō pouaka tomo.

reverseDns.title: Ngā Tautuhinga DNS Huri
reverseDns.changeWarning: Ka tae ake ki tētahi hāora ngā hurihanga ki te DNS huri ki te puta.

ipmiLive.title: IP IPMI
ipmiLive.description: Homai IP ora ki te kaiwhakahaere IPMI kua ārai ki tō IP ā mutu ana i roto i ngā hāora 24.

order.title: Ota Tūmau
order.hostnameHelp: Whakamahia te ingoa tūmau ki te tautuhi i te tūmau. Ehara te rohe i te mea me tika, i te rēhitatia rānei. Me whai tētahi ira kotahi i te ingoa tūmau. Ētahi atu tauira: database.local, web.server, tō.ingoa.
order.passwordRequirement: Tāpiri: Me whai te kupuhipa ōrite ki te 8 pūāhua, tētahi pūāhua iti, tētahi pūāhua nui, tētahi tau, tētahi pūāhua motuhake.
order.contactSales: Whakapā atu ki tō mātou tari hokohoko.
order.autoRenewNotice: Ka aunoa te whakahōu o te ohaurunga i muri i ia marama mō te {cost} tae noa ki te whakakore.
order.tosAcknowledgement: Mā te tīnei i tēnei pouaka, ka whakaaetia e koe ko koe e hoko ana i tētahi hua ohaurunga e aunoa ana te whakahōu (E ai ki ngā Tikanga i Whakaahuatia i Runga) ā ka utua ki te kāri nama e tukua ana e koe i tēnei rā. Ki te hiahia koe ki te whakakore i tō whakahōu aunoa, ka taea e koe te uru ki te kaitiaki kiritaki kōwhiri ana i te ratonga hohe ā pāwhiri ana i te hononga Whakakore i te īmēra rānei ki: billing{'@'}interserver.net i tētahi tikanga atu rānei i whakaahuatia i ngā Tikanga me ngā Āhuatanga. Mā te tīnei i te pouaka ā pāwhiri ana i te Whakatū Tōku Ota i raro, ka whakaaetia hoki e koe kua pānuitia, mārama, ā whakaae ana ki ā mātou Tikanga me ngā Āhuatanga me te Kaupapahere Tūmataitanga.
order.iAgreeToTerms: Kua pānuitia e ahau ngā tikanga i runga ā whakaae ana ahau.
